# Content Formats Explained

Understanding what content is generated and in which formats.

**Last Updated**: March 3, 2026  
**Status**: Architecture Documentation

---

## Quick Answer

**Pre-generated content = TEXT ONLY**

Other formats (audio, video, infographics) are generated ON-DEMAND or NOT generated at all.

---

## Content Format Breakdown

### 1. TEXT Content (Pre-Generated) ✅

**What**: Temple descriptions in written form  
**Generated by**: AWS Bedrock (Claude AI)  
**When**: Pre-generated by admin BEFORE users access  
**Stored in**: DynamoDB  
**Cost**: ~$0.0006 - $0.0092 per temple (one-time)  

**Sections Generated**:
- About (150-200 words)
- History (250-300 words)
- Significance (200-250 words)
- Architecture (250-300 words)

**Example Output**:
```json
{
  "templeId": "temple_001",
  "templeName": "Brihadeeswarar Temple",
  "content": {
    "about": "The Brihadeeswarar Temple, also known as...",
    "history": "Built in 1010 CE by Raja Raja Chola I...",
    "significance": "This UNESCO World Heritage Site...",
    "architecture": "The temple showcases Dravidian style..."
  }
}
```

---

### 2. AUDIO Content (Generated On-Demand) 🔊

**What**: Text-to-Speech (TTS) audio of temple descriptions  
**Generated by**: Google Cloud Text-to-Speech API  
**When**: Generated when user clicks "Play Audio" button  
**Stored in**: S3 bucket (cached after first generation)  
**Cost**: ~$0.000016 per request (first time), FREE after caching  

**How it works**:
```
User clicks "Play Audio"
    ↓
Check if audio exists in S3
    ↓
If YES → Stream from S3 (FREE)
    ↓
If NO → Generate with Google TTS → Save to S3 → Stream
```

**Languages Supported**:
- English
- Hindi
- Tamil
- Telugu
- Kannada
- Malayalam
- Bengali
- Marathi
- Gujarati

**Cost per temple**: ~$0.000144 (9 languages × $0.000016)  
**After first generation**: FREE (served from cache)

---

### 3. VIDEO Content (NOT Generated) ❌

**Status**: NOT IMPLEMENTED in current architecture

**Why not**:
- ❌ Very expensive to generate (~$1-$5 per video)
- ❌ Large storage costs (100MB-500MB per video)
- ❌ Slow generation time (5-30 minutes per video)
- ❌ High bandwidth costs for streaming
- ❌ Complex to maintain and update

**Alternative**:
- Use YouTube embeds for existing temple videos
- Link to external video sources
- Admin can manually upload videos if needed

**If you want videos in future**:
- Admin manually uploads videos
- Store in S3 or YouTube
- Embed video player in app
- Cost: Storage only (~$0.023/GB/month)

---

### 4. INFOGRAPHICS (NOT Generated) ❌

**Status**: NOT IMPLEMENTED in current architecture

**Why not**:
- ❌ Complex to generate automatically
- ❌ Requires design templates
- ❌ Quality may not be good enough
- ❌ Static images don't add much value over text

**Alternative**:
- Display text content in visually appealing cards
- Use temple photos instead
- Show key facts in formatted lists
- Use icons and visual elements in UI

**If you want infographics in future**:
- Admin creates infographics manually (Canva, Figma)
- Upload as images to S3
- Display in app gallery
- Cost: Storage only (~$0.023/GB/month)

---

## Content Generation Flow

### What Gets Pre-Generated (Before User Access)

```
Admin Portal
    ↓
Generate Text Content (Bedrock)
    ↓
Save to DynamoDB
    ↓
DONE - Ready for users
```

**Cost**: $0.60 - $9.20 one-time for 1,000 temples

---

### What Gets Generated On-Demand (When User Requests)

```
User clicks "Play Audio"
    ↓
Check S3 cache
    ↓
If not cached:
    Generate audio (Google TTS)
    Save to S3
    ↓
Stream audio to user
```

**Cost**: $0.000016 first time, FREE after that

---

### What's NOT Generated (Manual Upload Only)

- Videos (admin uploads manually)
- Infographics (admin creates manually)
- Photos (admin uploads manually)

---

## Detailed Cost Breakdown

### Per Temple Costs

| Content Type | Generation | Storage | Delivery | Total (First Time) | Total (Cached) |
|--------------|-----------|---------|----------|-------------------|----------------|
| **Text** | $0.0092 | $0.00001 | $0.000004 | $0.009214 | $0.000014 |
| **Audio (9 languages)** | $0.000144 | $0.00002 | $0.00001 | $0.000174 | $0.00003 |
| **Photos (manual)** | $0 | $0.0001 | $0.00001 | $0.00011 | $0.00011 |
| **Videos (manual)** | $0 | $0.023 | $0.001 | $0.024 | $0.024 |
| **Infographics (manual)** | $0 | $0.00005 | $0.00001 | $0.00006 | $0.00006 |

### For 1,000 Temples

| Content Type | One-Time Generation | Monthly Storage | Monthly Delivery (10K users) |
|--------------|-------------------|----------------|----------------------------|
| **Text** | $9.20 | $0.01 | $0.04 |
| **Audio** | $0.14 | $0.20 | $0.30 |
| **Photos** | $0 | $1.00 | $0.10 |
| **Videos** | $0 | $230.00 | $100.00 |
| **Infographics** | $0 | $0.50 | $0.10 |

**Recommended**: Text + Audio + Photos = $10.94 total

---

## How to Choose What to Generate

### Option 1: Minimal (Text Only) - CHEAPEST

**What you get**:
- ✅ Text descriptions (4 sections per temple)
- ❌ No audio
- ❌ No videos
- ❌ No infographics

**Cost**: $9.20 one-time + $0.05/month  
**Best for**: Testing, MVP, budget-conscious

**User experience**: Good - users can read about temples

---

### Option 2: Standard (Text + Audio) - RECOMMENDED

**What you get**:
- ✅ Text descriptions (4 sections per temple)
- ✅ Audio guides (9 languages)
- ❌ No videos
- ❌ No infographics

**Cost**: $9.34 one-time + $0.55/month  
**Best for**: Production launch, good user experience

**User experience**: Excellent - users can read OR listen

---

### Option 3: Enhanced (Text + Audio + Photos)

**What you get**:
- ✅ Text descriptions (4 sections per temple)
- ✅ Audio guides (9 languages)
- ✅ Photo galleries (admin uploads)
- ❌ No videos
- ❌ No infographics

**Cost**: $9.34 one-time + $1.65/month  
**Best for**: Full-featured app

**User experience**: Excellent - read, listen, view photos

---

### Option 4: Premium (Everything)

**What you get**:
- ✅ Text descriptions
- ✅ Audio guides
- ✅ Photo galleries
- ✅ Videos (admin uploads)
- ✅ Infographics (admin creates)

**Cost**: $9.34 one-time + $332.25/month  
**Best for**: High-budget, media-rich app

**User experience**: Premium - all media types

**⚠️ WARNING**: Videos are VERY expensive!

---

## Recommended Approach

### Phase 1: MVP Launch (Text + Audio)

```
1. Generate text content with Bedrock ($9.20)
2. Enable audio generation on-demand ($0.14)
3. Admin uploads 2-3 photos per temple (manual)
```

**Total cost**: ~$10 one-time + $0.55/month  
**User experience**: Excellent

---

### Phase 2: Add Photos (After Launch)

```
1. Admin uploads photo galleries
2. Store in S3
3. Display in app
```

**Additional cost**: +$1.10/month  
**User experience**: Better visual appeal

---

### Phase 3: Add Videos (Optional, Later)

```
1. Admin uploads videos OR embeds YouTube links
2. If uploading: Store in S3
3. If YouTube: Just embed links (FREE)
```

**Additional cost**: 
- YouTube embeds: FREE
- S3 storage: +$230/month (expensive!)

**Recommendation**: Use YouTube embeds instead of S3

---

## Configuration in Admin Portal

### Content Generation Settings

```typescript
// Admin can choose what to generate
const contentConfig = {
  text: {
    enabled: true,        // Always enabled
    sections: ['about', 'history', 'significance', 'architecture'],
    model: 'sonnet'       // or 'haiku'
  },
  audio: {
    enabled: true,        // Enable audio generation
    languages: ['en', 'hi', 'ta', 'te', 'kn', 'ml', 'bn', 'mr', 'gu'],
    generateOnDemand: true  // Generate when user requests
  },
  photos: {
    enabled: true,        // Allow photo uploads
    maxPerTemple: 10,
    uploadMethod: 'manual'  // Admin uploads
  },
  videos: {
    enabled: false,       // Disabled by default (expensive)
    uploadMethod: 'manual'  // Admin uploads if enabled
  },
  infographics: {
    enabled: false,       // Disabled by default
    uploadMethod: 'manual'  // Admin creates if enabled
  }
};
```

---

## How Users Access Different Formats

### In Mobile App

**Temple Detail Screen**:
```
┌─────────────────────────────┐
│ Brihadeeswarar Temple       │
│                             │
│ [Hero Photo]                │
│                             │
│ 📖 About                    │
│ [Text content here]         │
│ [🔊 Listen in English ▼]   │  ← Audio on-demand
│                             │
│ 📜 History                  │
│ [Text content here]         │
│ [🔊 Listen in Hindi ▼]     │  ← Audio on-demand
│                             │
│ 📸 Photo Gallery            │
│ [Photo thumbnails]          │  ← Manual uploads
│                             │
│ 🎥 Videos (if enabled)      │
│ [YouTube embeds]            │  ← External links
│                             │
└─────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## Summary

### What Gets Pre-Generated

| Format | Generated By | When | Cost |
|--------|-------------|------|------|
| **Text** | Bedrock AI | Before launch | $9.20 |
| **Audio** | Google TTS | On user request | $0.14 |
| **Photos** | Manual upload | Anytime | $0 |
| **Videos** | Manual upload | Anytime | $0 |
| **Infographics** | Manual creation | Anytime | $0 |

### Recommended Configuration

**For MVP Launch**:
- ✅ Text (pre-generated)
- ✅ Audio (on-demand)
- ✅ Photos (2-3 per temple, manual)
- ❌ Videos (too expensive)
- ❌ Infographics (not needed)

**Total Cost**: ~$10 one-time + $0.55/month

---

## How to Enable/Disable Formats

### In Environment Variables

```bash
# .env.production
ENABLE_TEXT_GENERATION=true
ENABLE_AUDIO_GENERATION=true
ENABLE_PHOTO_UPLOADS=true
ENABLE_VIDEO_UPLOADS=false
ENABLE_INFOGRAPHICS=false

# Audio settings
AUDIO_GENERATE_ON_DEMAND=true
AUDIO_LANGUAGES=en,hi,ta,te,kn,ml,bn,mr,gu

# Storage settings
S3_BUCKET_PHOTOS=temple-photos
S3_BUCKET_AUDIO=temple-audio
S3_BUCKET_VIDEOS=temple-videos
```

### In Admin Portal UI

Admin can toggle features:
```
Content Settings
├─ Text Generation: [✓] Enabled
├─ Audio Generation: [✓] Enabled (On-Demand)
├─ Photo Uploads: [✓] Enabled
├─ Video Uploads: [ ] Disabled
└─ Infographics: [ ] Disabled
```

---

## Key Takeaways

1. **TEXT is pre-generated** - Generated once, stored in DynamoDB
2. **AUDIO is on-demand** - Generated when user requests, cached in S3
3. **PHOTOS are manual** - Admin uploads, stored in S3
4. **VIDEOS are manual** - Admin uploads OR YouTube embeds
5. **INFOGRAPHICS are manual** - Admin creates if needed

**You choose what to enable based on budget and requirements!**

---

**Last Updated**: March 3, 2026  
**Recommended**: Text + Audio + Photos  
**Total Cost**: ~$10 one-time + $0.55/month
